name: threads-publisher
notes:
SETUP GUIDE

1. HOW TO IMPORT
   n8n Settings → Workflows → Import → paste this JSON

2. CREDENTIALS TO CONFIGURE
   Same Meta app as instagram-publisher workflow.
   - META_ACCESS_TOKEN: long-lived Meta Graph API access token
   - THREADS_USER_ID: your Threads user ID (same as or linked to Instagram user ID)
   How to get THREADS_USER_ID:
     Meta Graph API Explorer → GET /{user-id}?fields=id,name
     Or: same as INSTAGRAM_USER_ID if accounts are linked

3. META DEVELOPER APP SETUP
   Same app used for Instagram publishing. Additionally:
   - Add 'Threads API' product in App Dashboard → Add Product → Threads API
   - Required scopes for Threads: threads_basic, threads_content_publish
   - Grant these scopes when generating your access token

4. VIDEO NOT SUPPORTED (ORGANIC API)
   IMPORTANT: Threads organic API does NOT support video publishing as of early 2026.
   Only Threads Ads (paid) support video. This workflow publishes:
     - text + thumbnail image (when thumbnail is available)
     - text only (fallback when no thumbnail is available)
   When Threads adds organic video support, update media_type to VIDEO and use the
   same two-step pattern as instagram-publisher. Monitor: @threadsapi.changelog on Threads.

5. TWO-STEP PUBLISH PATTERN (same as Instagram)
   Step 1: POST /{threads-user-id}/threads → returns container_id
   Step 2: POST /{threads-user-id}/threads_publish → returns post_id

6. HOW TO ACTIVATE
   After credential setup: toggle to Active

7. HOW TO TEST
   - Update any content_bank row status to 'approved' with platform_angles.threads set
   - If visual_assets.thumbnails is populated: posts as IMAGE type with thumbnail
   - If no thumbnail: posts as TEXT type
   - Check 'Update content_bank with Threads post ID' node output for confirmation

8. KNOWN LIMITATION: VIDEO NOT SUPPORTED
   Threads organic API does not support video publishing as of early 2026.
   Only Threads Ads (paid promotion) support video upload.
   This workflow posts text + thumbnail image as the best available alternative.
   Track Threads API changelog for organic video support updates.
   Reference: https://developers.facebook.com/docs/threads

nodes.name: Trigger: Supabase content_bank approved
nodes.notes: Watches content_bank table for INSERT and UPDATE events. The IF filter below restricts to status=approved rows only. Triggers when the Slack approval workflow sets status=approved.

nodes.name: Filter: status = approved
nodes.notes: Only proceed when content_bank row status = 'approved'. Ignores pending_review, draft, rejected, and published states.

nodes.name: Filter: has Threads content
nodes.notes: Only proceed when platform_angles.threads is populated. The AI content generation pipeline (Phase 10-03) should populate this field with the Threads post text.

nodes.name: Set Variables
nodes.notes: NOTE — VIDEO NOT SUPPORTED: Threads organic API does not support video publishing as of early 2026. Only Threads Ads (paid) support video. This workflow posts text + thumbnail image (or text-only as fallback). When Threads adds organic video support, update media_type to VIDEO and use the same two-step pattern as instagram-publisher. Monitor: @threadsapi.changelog on Threads.

nodes.name: Route: Has thumbnail?
nodes.notes: Routes to IMAGE post (True) or TEXT-only post (False). Checks visual_assets.thumbnails[0] and visual_assets.thumbnail_grid_url as fallback. IMAGE post requires a publicly accessible URL for the thumbnail.

nodes.name: Step 1a: Create Threads IMAGE Container
nodes.notes: Creates a Threads media container with media_type=IMAGE and the thumbnail URL as image_url. Text content is included. Returns {id: container_id} which is used in the publish step. Note: VIDEO media_type is NOT supported organically as of early 2026 — only IMAGE and TEXT are available without Threads Ads.

nodes.name: Step 1b: Create Threads TEXT Container
nodes.notes: Fallback: creates a TEXT-only Threads container when no thumbnail is available. Text posts on Threads can be up to 500 characters. The threads_post_text should be trimmed to fit if needed.

nodes.name: Merge: Capture Container ID
nodes.notes: Captures the container_id from either the IMAGE or TEXT container creation step. Both branches converge here before publishing. Also carries forward credentials needed for the publish step.

nodes.name: Step 2: Publish Threads Post
nodes.notes: Step 2 of 2 in Threads two-step publish. POST to /{threads-user-id}/threads_publish with creation_id=container_id publishes the post. Response contains {id: threads_post_id}. Unlike Instagram Reels, Threads does not require polling — publish is immediate.

nodes.name: Store Threads Post ID
nodes.notes: Stores the threads_post_id from the threads_publish response. This ID can be used to retrieve post insights via the Threads Insights API.

nodes.name: Update content_bank with Threads post ID

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ...($('Trigger: Supabase content_bank approved').item.json.platform_angles || {}), threads_post_id: $json.threads_post_id, threads_published_at: $json.published_at }) }}

nodes.notes: Updates content_bank.platform_angles JSONB to include threads_post_id and threads_published_at. Merges with existing platform_angles to preserve all platform content and existing fields.

nodes.name: Log: No Threads content (skip)

assignments.name: skipped_reason
assignments.value: No platform_angles.threads content available — AI content generation pipeline (Phase 10-03) must populate this field before Threads publishing can occur.

nodes.notes: Graceful skip when no Threads content is available. The AI generation pipeline should populate platform_angles.threads with the post text before this workflow triggers.

main.node: Update content_bank with Threads post ID
